title: Hold Period Phase 4 — Leasing & Revenue Management Downstream Data
description: Shape of the dataForDownstream object written to the master checkpoint by the hold-period leasing phase. Covers the active leasing pipeline, renewal forecast with probability-weighted pricing, CAM reconciliation results, and effective rent trends.

leasingPipeline.description: Active new-lease leasing funnel with conversion metrics.

totalProspects.description: Total active prospects in the leasing funnel.

newProspectsThisMonth.description: New prospects added in current month.

conversionRate.description: Overall prospect-to-lease conversion rate (0–1), trailing 90 days.

avgDaysToLease.description: Average days from first contact to signed lease.

projectedLeasesThisQuarter.description: Probability-weighted projected new leases to execute this quarter.

projectedRevenueThisQuarter.description: Probability-weighted projected new lease revenue for the quarter.

funnelStages.description: Prospect count and conversion rate by funnel stage.

stage.description: Funnel stage label: INQUIRY, TOUR_SCHEDULED, TOURED, APPLICATION, APPROVED, SIGNED.

stageConversionRate.description: Conversion rate from this stage to the next (0–1).

priorRent.description: Prior tenant's monthly rent for the same unit.

vacantUnits.description: Current number of vacant units available for lease.

avgDaysVacant.description: Average days on market for currently vacant units.

renewalForecast.description: Upcoming lease expiration analysis with renewal probability and pricing.

expiringNext12Months.description: Summary of leases expiring in the next 12 months.

unitCount.description: Number of leases expiring in next 12 months.

sfExpiring.description: Total square footage of expiring leases.

percentOfPortfolio.description: Expiring leases as percent of total rent roll.

expectedNonRenewalRentLoss.description: Annualized rent loss from expected non-renewals.

renewalPricingStrategy.description: Renewal rent pricing approach and targets.

avgProposedRentIncrease.description: Average proposed rent increase for renewing tenants (decimal, e.g., 0.05 = 5%).

blendedRentGrowthExpected.description: Blended rent growth across new and renewal leases (decimal).

concessionBudgetPerRenewal.description: Allocated concession budget per renewing tenant.

renewalDetails.description: Per-tenant renewal status for expiring leases.

renewalNPV.description: NPV of retaining this tenant vs. re-leasing (positive = renew).

camReconciliation.description: Common area maintenance and operating expense reconciliation results (commercial leases).

reconciliationPeriod.description: Period covered by this reconciliation (e.g., FY2025).

totalEstimatedRecoveries.description: Total CAM/operating expenses billed to tenants during the period.

totalActualExpenses.description: Total actual recoverable operating expenses incurred.

overUnderBilling.description: Estimated recoveries minus actual expenses. Positive = overbilled (tenant credit); negative = underbilled (additional charge).

recoveryRate.description: Percent of total operating expenses recovered from tenants (0–1).

proRataShare.description: Tenant's pro-rata share of recoverable expenses (0–1).

estimatedPayments.description: Estimated CAM payments made during the period.

settlementAmount.description: Net settlement. Positive = tenant owes landlord; negative = landlord credits tenant.

excludedExpenses.description: Expense categories excluded from recovery per lease terms.

effectiveRentTrends.description: Effective rent trend analysis capturing net rent after concessions and free rent periods.

currentAvgAskingRent.description: Current average asking rent per unit or SF.

currentAvgEffectiveRent.description: Current average effective rent after concessions.

concessionRate.description: Average concession as percent of asking rent (0–1).

newLeaseRentVsPrior.description: Average rent change on new leases vs. prior rent for the same units (decimal).

renewalRentVsPrior.description: Average rent change on renewal leases vs. expiring rent (decimal).

blendedRentGrowth.description: Blended rent growth across new and renewal leases (decimal).

lossToLeaseCurrent.description: Current loss-to-lease in dollars (market rent minus in-place rent, annualized).

lossToLeasePercent.description: Current loss-to-lease as percent of potential gross income.

trendData.description: Historical monthly or quarterly effective rent trend.

submarketRentBenchmark.description: Current submarket average effective rent for benchmarking.

propertyRentPremiumToMarket.description: Property effective rent minus submarket benchmark.
